rationale: The citing paper estimates a joint category-needs (incidence-like) and store-choice model on household scanner data with correlated heterogeneity, while the cited paper’s core contribution is a joint no-purchase incidence + brand-choice scanner-panel model with cross-equation dependence and Bayesian estimation. This clear methodological overlap makes the citation plausibly a substantive modeling/theory source rather than an incidental mention, so it should be reviewed in second-stage judgment.
